summary: ~15+ remaining Drizzle .get() calls across the codebase need migrating to .limit(1) for Postgres compatibility
details: This lane fixed 5 .get() calls in v2/session.ts and control-plane/workspace.ts. The critic identified ~15+ more calls in project.ts, prompt.ts, message-v2.ts, share-next.ts, permission/index.ts, account/repo.ts, data-migration.ts, sync/index.ts, and session/projectors.ts. These will break silently when the SQLite adapter is fully removed. A follow-up lane should migrate all remaining .get() → .limit(1) sites.
